title: Install, maintain and repair farm fencing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install, maintain and repair farm fencing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for farm fencing work

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work instructions with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work instructions with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify and report workplace health and safety hazards and risks to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report workplace health and safety hazards and risks to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report workplace health and safety hazards and risks to supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out routine pre-operational checks of tools?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out routine pre-operational checks of tools.

pcs.text: Identify faulty or unsafe tools, and separate for repair or replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faulty or unsafe tools, and separate for repair or replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faulty or unsafe tools, and separate for repair or replacement.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Prepare fencing materials, tools and equipment for transport to worksite
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare fencing materials, tools and equipment for transport to worksite?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare fencing materials, tools and equipment for transport to worksite.

pcs.text: Position and attach gates and check their operation according to manufacturer instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position and attach gates and check their operation according to manufacturer instructions.
